ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g. sedan, SUV) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g. electric, gasoline) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g. automatic, manual) */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the battery (in kWh) */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software installed on the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g. GPS, accelerometer, camera) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the sensor is installed on */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "ts" REAL /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "pos_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "pos_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "vel_x" REAL /* X-component of the vehicle's velocity */,
  "vel_y" REAL /* Y-component of the vehicle's velocity */,
  "acc_x" REAL /* X-component of the vehicle's acceleration */,
  "acc_y" REAL /* Y-component of the vehicle's acceleration */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the vehicle (in degrees) */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch of the vehicle (in degrees) */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll of the vehicle (in degrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "near_bank" (
  "near_bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each near bank data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that this near bank data corresponds to */,
  "near_bank" INTEGER /* Whether the vehicle is near a bank or not */,
  "bank_distance" REAL /* Distance to the bank (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("near_bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_near_bank_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_x" (
  "sensor_x_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor x-axis data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that this sensor x-axis data corresponds to */,
  "sensor_x" REAL /* X-axis value of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_x_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_x_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_y" (
  "sensor_y_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor y-axis data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that this sensor y-axis data corresponds to */,
  "sensor_y" REAL /* Y-axis value of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_y_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_y_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. administrator, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used to hash the password */,
  "last_login" REAL /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g. login, logout) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g. online, offline) */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the status entry */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Additional message describing the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_status_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each config entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration of the vehicle (e.g. sensor settings) */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the config entry */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_config_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g. collision detection) */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the alert (e.g. high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g. software update, hardware repair) */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Timestamp of the trip start */,
  "end_time" REAL /* Timestamp of the trip end */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Location where the trip started */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Location where the trip ended */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip (in kilometers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather data (e.g. city, state) */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (in Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (in percent) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (in km/h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)
